add_params.name: GUID
add_params.description: Template GUID; auto-generated by PS1 if not supplied. Both Add (new) and Edit forms send this.

add_params.name: rawJSON
add_params.description: Serialised JSON string of the full reusable-policy-setting graph object. PS1 reads $Request.Body.rawJSON ?? $Request.Body.RawJSON ?? $Request.Body.json

add_params.name: tenantFilter
add_params.description: Used by the edit form; the PS1 for AddIntuneReusableSettingTemplate is AnyTenant so tenantFilter is informational only here.

add_params.name: package
add_params.description: Present in the edit-form formatter output but not read by the PS1; likely a passthrough for future use.

notes: Both the Add page (AddIntuneReusableSettingTemplate) and the Edit page (EditReusableSettingsTemplate) POST to /api/AddIntuneReusableSettingTemplate. The formatter in both cases outputs { GUID, displayName, description, rawJSON, tenantFilter }. The Edit page also outputs 'package' which the PS1 ignores. PS1 uses case-insensitive field coalescing: displayName ?? DisplayName ?? displayname and rawJSON ?? RawJSON ?? json. All POST field names from the formatter match what the PS1 expects.
